## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Build / release
- [ ] Security hardening

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo check --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo build --release -p aish-provider-shell`
- [ ] `npm run site:build`
- [ ] Manual Windows verification
- [ ] Manual macOS verification
- [ ] Manual Linux verification
- [ ] Not applicable

## Screenshots or recordings

Add screenshots for UI, website, installer, or terminal-profile changes.

## Security-sensitive areas

Mark any affected areas:

- [ ] Command execution or command planning
- [ ] Approval gates
- [ ] Installer scripts
- [ ] Shell profile edits
- [ ] PATH or environment variables
- [ ] Release workflows or artifacts
- [ ] Model file discovery/loading
- [ ] None

## Notes for reviewers

Call out anything that needs extra scrutiny.
